# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"
  RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "release_notes.md"
  DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX: "deploy"

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
    - when: always

default:
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git bash curl jq || true
    - |
      export MR_TITLE="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-}"
      export MR_DESC="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-}"
      if [ -z "$MR_TITLE" ] && [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        MR_JSON="$(curl --silent --header "JOB-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID")"
        MR_TITLE="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.title // empty')"
        MR_DESC="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.description // empty')"
      fi
      export MR_TITLE
      export MR_DESC
      export CLEAN_MR_TITLE="$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g; s/^ *//; s/ *$//')"
      export CLEAN_MR_DESC="$(echo "$MR_DESC" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g; s/^ *//; s/ *$//')"

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building for MR: ${CLEAN_MR_TITLE:-unknown}"
    - |
      if [ -n "$CLEAN_MR_DESC" ]; then
        {
          echo "## Build Notification"
          echo ""
          echo "MR Title: $CLEAN_MR_TITLE"
          echo "MR Description: $CLEAN_MR_DESC"
        } > build_notification.txt
      else
        {
          echo "## Build Notification"
          echo ""
          echo "MR Title: $CLEAN_MR_TITLE"
        } > build_notification.txt
      fi
    - cat build_notification.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build_notification.txt

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Testing changes for: ${CLEAN_MR_TITLE:-unknown}"

generate_release_notes:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - |
      {
        echo "# Release Notes"
        echo ""
        echo "## Deployment Context"
        echo "- MR Title: ${CLEAN_MR_TITLE:-unknown}"
        [ -n "$CLEAN_MR_DESC" ] && echo "- MR Description: $CLEAN_MR_DESC"
        echo ""
        echo "## Commit Message"
        echo "- Deployed feature: ${CLEAN_MR_TITLE:-unknown}"
      } > "$RELEASE_NOTES_FILE"
    - |
      COMMIT_MSG="deploy: ${CLEAN_MR_TITLE:-unknown}"
      if [ -n "$CLEAN_MR_DESC" ]; then
        COMMIT_MSG="$COMMIT_MSG | ${CLEAN_MR_DESC}"
      fi
      echo "$COMMIT_MSG" > commit_message.txt
    - cat "$RELEASE_NOTES_FILE"
    - cat commit_message.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release_notes.md
      - commit_message.txt

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - generate_release_notes
  script:
    - |
      DEPLOY_TAG="${DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX}/${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}"
      if [ -n "$CLEAN_MR_TITLE" ]; then
        CLEAN_TAG_TITLE="$(echo "$CLEAN_MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9.\-]\+/-/g; s/^-//; s/-$//')"
        DEPLOY_TAG="$DEPLOY_TAG-${CLEAN_TAG_TITLE}"
      fi
      echo "Creating deployment tag: $DEPLOY_TAG"
      git config user.email "${GITLAB_USER_EMAIL:-ci@example.com}"
      git config user.name "${GITLAB_USER_NAME:-gitlab-ci}"
      git tag -a "$DEPLOY_TAG" -m "Deploy: ${CLEAN_MR_TITLE:-unknown}"
      git push origin "$DEPLOY_TAG"
    - |
      COMMIT_MSG="$(cat commit_message.txt)"
      echo "Deploy notification: $COMMIT_MSG"
      echo "MR Title: ${CLEAN_MR_TITLE:-unknown}"
      [ -n "$CLEAN_MR_DESC" ] && echo "MR Description: $CLEAN_MR_DESC"
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://example.com
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
